description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat, slightly sloped roof and a combination of wood, concrete, and glass materials. The front facade features a large set of glass sliding doors, a prominent wooden accent wall, and a sheltered entryway. The side elevations display a mix of narrow and wide windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The rear of the bungalow is simpler, with a single door and a wide window, while the other side has a small window and a utility box. The structure sits on a concrete platform, with a small porch area at the front. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a blend of natural and industrial materials.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat, sloped roof, large glass doors, wood accents, and a concrete base. The design features clean lines and a mix of wide and narrow windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing large glass sliding doors, a wooden accent wall, and a sheltered entryway on a concrete platform.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended roof overhang, three narrow windows, and a plain wall with minimal detailing.
description_view_2: Rear view with a single door, a wide window, and a simple concrete step leading to the entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a small window, a utility box, and the continuation of the roof overhang with a partial view of the front porch.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side windows and large front glass doors
